title: acer rubrum subsp. microphyllum
intro: Acer rubrum subsp. microphyllum, also known as the Red Maple Dwarf or Compact Red Maple, is a subspecies of the Red Maple tree native to North America, characterized by its smaller size and compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer rubrum subsp. microphyllum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements.
